case_title: FANG RONG VS. BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATIO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $110.00 SERVED OCT-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF FANG RONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONKDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,457.71 FILED BY RONG, FANG AS TO DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONG, FANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATIO $3,457.71 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,617.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
